physical_deletion_guard.remaining_deletion_scope: Only visual authority functions, refs-only projections, diagnostic direct CLI surfaces, and declared visual pack inputs remain in RCA default package surfaces.

modules.migrationAction: Move generic scheduling, queueing, daemon, retry and attempt lifecycle ownership to OPL family scheduler; keep only RCA visual stage DAG refs.
modules.retentionReason: RCA must define visual deliverable stage order and route-specific gate meaning for ppt_deck, xiaohongshu and poster families.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can absorb scheduler mechanics but cannot own visual stage semantics, route policy or visual readiness authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: managed_dag_scheduler still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Consume OPL generic transition runner for idempotent tick, retry/dead-letter, provider attempt bridge and state-machine runner mechanics; keep RCA visual transition guard refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA keeps the visual transition table, guard refs, repair action meaning, typed blockers and owner receipt refs.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: A generic runner cannot decide source readiness, visual review readiness, repair target meaning or export authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: attempt_state_machine_runner still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Consume OPL attempt ledger/provider receipt storage while RCA exposes managed-run locator refs and visual-domain summaries.
modules.retentionReason: RCA keeps locator refs and visual run summaries needed to correlate provider receipts with domain-owned deliverable truth.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL owns the generic attempt ledger; it must not absorb canonical artifacts, review verdicts or visual run truth.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: managed_run_json_store still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Consume OPL/App generic session shell, resume token, operator navigation and workbench state; keep RCA entry-session domain snapshot refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains entry_session_id to deliverable/topic/run locators and domain-specific continuation snapshot refs.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can own session shell UX but cannot own RCA deliverable truth, review/export gate or visual session authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: product_entry_session_store still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move generic workspace locator, source receipt shell, material gap queue and provenance navigation to OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA must judge visual source readiness, audience promise inputs and communication strategy source adequacy.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can host source transport but cannot own RCA source readiness verdict or narrative/visual source interpretation.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: workspace_source_intake still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move body-free memory transport, freshness grouping and receipt inventory shell to OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns visual pattern memory body, accept/reject decision and lesson quality semantics.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL must not store visual memory body or decide whether a visual pattern is reusable for RCA deliverables.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: memory_writeback_receipt_transport still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Consume OPL/App generic artifact inventory, gallery, restore/provenance navigation and handoff shell; keep RCA artifact authority and export verdict refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns canonical visual artifacts, exportability verdict and artifact mutation permission.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL may index artifact refs but cannot publish, mutate or declare RCA visual artifacts exportable.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: artifact_export_lifecycle still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move blocked-item queue, rerun envelope, human approval lane and repair transport shell to OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns visual review/export verdicts, blocked-item meaning and repair target selection.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL transport cannot decide if a slide/page is visually acceptable, exportable or needs a specific RCA repair route.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: review_repair_transport still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move helper registration, environment/provisioning metadata, execution receipt and operator-safe launch envelope to OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns PPT/image/export helper implementation and route-specific mutation/review integration.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can standardize execution envelope but cannot own domain helper logic that mutates RCA visual artifacts.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: native_helper_envelope still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move generic dashboard/workbench layout, attention queue, repair command projection and drilldown shell to OPL App.
modules.retentionReason: RCA provides domain evidence refs, blocker meaning and safe repair hints for visual deliverable readiness.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL App may render projections but cannot turn them into RCA visual ready/exportable claims.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: operator_projection_shell still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move generic wrapper generation, command surface registration and MCP action scaffolding to OPL standard domain-agent scaffold.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains canonical action metadata and domain handlers because they encode visual deliverable authority boundaries.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can generate wrappers but cannot own RCA action semantics or guarded sidecar handler authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: generic_cli_mcp_wrappers still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Move concrete executor lifecycle/provisioning/receipt adapter to OPL generic Agent Executor Adapter.
modules.retentionReason: RCA keeps route-level executor requirements and Codex CLI as current first-class default for visual deliverables.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can provide executor adapter mechanics but cannot promise non-Codex outputs are visually equivalent for RCA routes.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: codex_executor_adapter still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Keep observability exporter, SLO, control-loop summary, usage and resource-pressure aggregation in OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA contributes domain blocker meaning, visual-safe repair hints and no-regression evidence refs.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL observability cannot authorize RCA quality, exportability or visual remediation decisions.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: observability_stability_read_model still has active callers or retained RCA visual authority refs; physical deletion waits for OPL replacement adoption and no-active-caller proof.

modules.migrationAction: Provide declarative visual pack input for OPL-generated CLI/MCP/product-entry/sidecar/status/session/workbench/harness surfaces.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains visual stage, action, policy, receipt and fixture declarations as domain pack input.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can generate wrappers from this input, but cannot own RCA visual truth, review/export verdicts or artifact authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: Declarative pack input is a required RCA domain package surface, not a generic runtime shell.

modules.migrationAction: Retain only visual authority functions while OPL generates generic wrappers and runtime shells.
modules.retentionReason: RCA must decide visual source readiness, visual direction, review/export verdicts, artifact mutation, visual memory acceptance and owner receipts.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: These functions are RCA domain authority and cannot be moved to OPL without moving visual truth.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: Minimal authority functions are the allowed RCA retention surface.

retire_tombstone_candidates.retained_rca_surface: direct deliverable managed supervision diagnostic surface
